gaia.dr3.dr2_neighbourhood.reason: Official forward DR2-to-DR3 neighbourhood rows are release-scoped identity edges compiled and verified by the E2 identity graph, not scientific parameter evidence.

gaia.dr3.dr2_neighbourhood_reverse.reason: Reverse-neighbourhood completeness rows audit the E2 release bridge and do not assert an additional scientific measurement.

multiplicity.sbx_legacy_projection.reason: Disabled lossy projection is retained only for served-build A/B comparison; complete SBX has the active E4 adapter.

nasa_exoplanet_archive.planetary_systems.reason: Disabled field-limited projection is retained only for served-build A/B comparison; the complete NASA release has the active E4 adapter.

gaia.dr3.gaia_source_legacy_projection.reason: Disabled bounded projection is an E6 baseline only; the complete buffered Gaia release is the E4 input.

gaia.dr3.astrophysical_parameters_legacy.reason: Disabled field-limited projection is an E6 baseline only; main and supplementary AP releases carry E4 evidence.

gaia.dr3.non_single_star_legacy_projecti.reason: Disabled field-limited projection is an E6 baseline only; expanded NSS has the active E4 adapter.

transitional.athyg.reason: AT-HYG remains transitional alias/crosswalk and served-stability context; it is not a scientific measurement authority and does not receive an E4 parameter adapter.

infrared.catwise2020_targeted.reason: The bounded CatWISE2020 response set is preserved and typed through the shared E1 contract, then compiled by the independently verified E7 clean WISE projection without CORE promotion.

infrared.allwise_targeted.reason: The bounded AllWISE response set is preserved and typed through the shared E1 contract, then compiled by the independently verified E7 clean WISE projection without CORE promotion.
